content: {"file": "backend/api/routers/clarify.py", "summary": "This file contains an API endpoint for submitting clarification answers to a job in the pipeline. It checks if the job exists and requires clarification, then schedules the resume_after_clarification task in the background.", "rules": [{"name": "submit_clarification_answers", "description": "Handles POST requests to submit clarification answers for a specific job ID.", "conditions": ["Job state must exist and require clarification"], "actions": ["Raise HTTP 404 if job not found; raise HTTP 409 if no clarification needed; schedule resume_after_clarification task in background"]}], "dependencies": ["fastapi", "pydantic", "pipeline.runner"]}
